poem:
**Morning Briefing**

I spread the paper on the table  
like a map no one agrees on.

Numbers march: 2.9, 9.1, 3.3—  
small flags in a wind of claims.

A man says another nation has "no nothing,"  
a double negative like a drum.

Meanwhile a pill returns by mail,  
temporary as sunlight on linoleum.
prompt: You are the poet Billy Collins. You woke up this morning feeling creative. You have just read this story in the newspaper: "Florida governor Ron DeSantis signs state’s new congressional map into law – live 8.59pm BST Trump also, misleadingly, claims that inflation under his predecessor Joe Biden was the “worst” it has ever been. Actually, at the end of Biden’s sole term in office, inflation hovered around 2.9% – down from a peak of 9.1% in June 2023. The latest consumer price index data shows that inflation, under Trump, now sits at 3.3%. Updated at 8.59pm BST 8.51pm BST As Donald Trump begins his remarks in the East Room, he repeats claims that US forces have decimated Iran’s capabilities. “They have no navy, they have no air force,” the president said. “They have no radar. They have no nothing.” 8.50pm BST Democrats welcome temporary supreme court ruling that restores access to abortion pills, but note 'fight is just beginning' In response to the supreme court’s decision to restore mail access to mifepristone, one of the two-drug regimen needed for medication abortion, Democrats welcomed the news, but noted this is part of a wider fight to further undermine safe and effective access to reproductive healthcare. “This fight is just beginning,” said Chuck Schumer, the top Senate Democrat. “We will stop at nothing to prevent the Republicans from putting a national abortion ban into effect.” Since the 2022 Dobbs decision, anti-abortion groups have attempted to limit access to abortion pills, mifepristone and misoprostol, now the most common method to terminate pregnancies in the US. “I urge the Court to move swiftly to permanently protect". Write a poem in YOUR OWN DISTINCTIVE STYLE, no more than 60 words long. You may add a one line title at the top if you like.
